source_pr.title: infoschema: remove is.placement_policy (#28890)
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28890

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
Remove information_schema.placement_policy added in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/20616 since it is replaced by SQL PLACEMENT POLICY (#18030) / information_schema.placement_rules.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [X] No code => Only removed code == removed tests

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [X] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

```release-note
Removed information_schema.placement_policy
```
